from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
engine = create_engine\('postgresql://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/sabaform'\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    r = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT count\(*\) FROM events'\)\)
    print\('Eventi:', r.scalar\(\)\)
    r = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT count\(*\) FROM participants'\)\)
    print\('Partecipanti:', r.scalar\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import os
os.environ['DATABASE_URL'] = 'postgresql://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/saba_workflow'
from app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)
with app.app_context\(\):
    from app.services.sabaform_service import get_events
    events = get_events\(\)
    print\(f'Eventi trovati: {len\(events\)}'\)
    for e in events[:3]:
        print\(f'  - {e[\\"name\\"]} \({e[\\"participant_count\\"]} partecipanti\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
engine = create_engine\('postgresql://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/sabaform'\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'events' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\)\)
    for row in r:
        print\(row[0]\)
" 2>&1)
